theme: Production database corruption discovered at morning health check plus Vertex sprint planning blocked by missing product requirements

events.text: Morning health check alert: database integrity check failed — 3 tables showing checksum mismatch since 07:12
NOVA-701 Critical — DB integrity failure detected, 3 tables corrupted: user_sessions, billing_records, feature_flags
REVERT: db-migration-v3.sql — nightly migration job may have caused corruption, reverting immediately
DBA: checksum mismatch in user_sessions (14,200 rows), billing_records (8,847 rows), feature_flags (412 rows)
URGENT: DB corruption war room — CTO called at 08:01, DBA lead and engineering lead joining
Infra: read replicas also showing corruption — issue is on primary, replicated before detection at 07:12
NOVA-702 opened — read replica corruption confirmed, all 3 replica nodes affected
CTO: check last clean backup timestamp — we need a restore point before migration at 02:00
test: validate last clean backup integrity before DB restore begins
DBA: last clean backup confirmed at 01:47 — 13 minutes before migration, 5 hours 13 minutes of transactions since
NOVA-701 update — clean backup at 01:47 confirmed, 5h13m of transaction logs to replay after restore
CTO: 5 hours of transaction logs — is WAL replay viable or do we rebuild from scratch
DBA: WAL replay viable — transaction logs intact, replay estimated 35 minutes, zero data loss
NOVA-703 opened — WAL replay strategy approved, restore from 01:47 backup starting
Subject: DB corruption incident — customer impact assessment | Body: Corruption detected 07:12, assessment in progress, customer-facing impact being evaluated
Sprint planning session cannot start — product requirements doc for Q2 features not delivered by Ritika (product lead)
VTX-401 Blocked — sprint planning stalled, PRD missing for 4 of 6 planned sprint features
Engineering lead: team of 6 blocked for sprint planning — 3.5 dev-days being lost if not resolved by noon
Subject: Sprint planning PRD missing | Body: Ritika's PRD for Q2 sprint features not submitted, team blocked from capacity planning
VTX-402 opened — escalating PRD delay to product VP, sprint start at risk
DBA: restore from 01:47 backup initiated — ETA 8 minutes to restore base, then 35 minutes WAL replay
NOVA-703 In Progress — backup restore initiated, estimated completion 08:50
Infra: taking production read path offline during restore — users will see read-only degraded mode
feat: enable read-only degraded mode — redirects read traffic to cached responses during DB restore
Read-only mode live — 94% of user requests served from cache, write operations queued, no errors showing
NOVA-704 opened — write operation queue monitoring during restore, 340 writes queued in first 8 minutes
Subject: Nova maintenance mode — user communication | Body: System in planned maintenance, read-only mode active, estimated resolution 09:00
Ritika responded to escalation — PRD is 80% complete, delay caused by stakeholder feedback loop from VP Product yesterday
VTX-401 updated — PRD 80% complete, Ritika committing delivery by 10:00
Engineering lead: 10:00 PRD delivery means sprint planning can start at 10:30 — acceptable if confirmed firm
Client requesting sprint demo rescheduled from today to tomorrow — conflict with their board preparation
ATL-701 — sprint demo rescheduled to tomorrow 14:00, team using today for QA hardening
PM: demo reschedule actually benefits us — 3 known UI polish items can be fixed before tomorrow
fix: UI polish — table column alignment, empty state messaging, loading skeleton on 3 slow endpoints
ATL-702 In Progress — 3 UI polish items being addressed before tomorrow's demo
Batch processing job completed overnight — 2.3M records processed, zero failures, 18% faster than previous run

docs: overnight batch performance report — 2.3M records, 18% improvement, zero failures
DB restore progress: base restore 60% complete — estimated completion 08:16
NOVA-703 update — base restore 60% complete

test: validate write queue overflow protection — confirm alert fires at 5,000 queued writes
Product VP responded to escalation — Ritika's PRD will be delivered by 10:00 confirmed, VP personally reviewing last 20%
VTX-401 update — VP Product confirmed PRD by 10:00, sprint planning confirmed for 10:30
Engineering lead sending 10:30 sprint planning invite — sharing feature list with team to pre-read
Sprint planning session — confirmed 10:30, engineering team of 6 attending, PRD pre-read shared
fix: loading skeleton added to 3 slow endpoints — dashboard analytics, user list, billing summary
QA testing UI polish fixes — all 3 skeleton loaders showing correctly in staging
DB restore progress: base restore complete at 08:16 — starting WAL replay now, ETA 35 minutes
NOVA-703 update — base restore complete, WAL replay starting, estimated completion 08:51
DBA: WAL replay at 0 minutes — replaying 5 hours 13 minutes of transactions, monitoring for conflicts
test: WAL replay conflict detection — monitoring for constraint violations during transaction replay
Sprint 18 task allocation complete — 14 tasks assigned, 3 engineers starting new feature work today
ORN-402 Sprint 18 kickoff — 14 tasks allocated, 3 engineers starting feature development

UI polish QA: table column alignment fixed — correct across 4 table types in staging
fix: empty state messaging — 6 screens now show contextual guidance instead of blank states

Engineering team pre-reading sprint features — 2 engineers flagging technical concerns about Feature 3 scope

VTX-403 technical risk flagged — Feature 3 real-time sync may require WebSocket infrastructure build
Subject: Feature 3 technical risk | Body: WebSocket infrastructure not in current stack, may add 5-7 days to sprint estimate

NOVA-703 update — WAL replay 9.6% complete, no conflicts
DBA: replay speed 30 minutes processed in 3 minutes — at this rate full replay completes at 08:42
NOVA-703 revised ETA — WAL replay speed better than estimated, completion now 08:42 not 08:51
Customer support: zero complaints so far — maintenance mode messaging effective, users aware of read-only state

VTX-403 resolved — Feature 3 scoped to polling MVP, WebSocket deferred to Sprint 19

feat: anomaly context enrichment — adds metric history and trend direction to each alert payload
ORN-404 In Progress — anomaly context enrichment adding trend direction to alerts
Alert enrichment tested — p95 metric history attached correctly to 94% of test alerts
WAL replay progress: 2h45m replayed of 5h13m — 52.7% complete, no conflicts
NOVA-703 update — WAL replay 52.7% complete
DBA: halfway through replay — corruption root cause being identified in parallel
test: isolate corruption trigger in migration v3 — identifying specific SQL statement causing checksum failure
DBA: root cause found — migration v3 used UPDATE without WHERE clause on feature_flags, corrupted all 412 rows
NOVA-705 root cause — UPDATE without WHERE in migration v3 overwrote all feature_flag values, cascaded to sessions and billing
CTO: how did this pass review — UPDATE without WHERE should be caught by migration linter
Engineering: migration linter rule for unqualified UPDATE exists but was bypassed using --force flag in deployment script
NOVA-706 process failure — --force flag bypassed linter, deployment script allowed unsafe override
fix: remove --force flag from deployment script, add mandatory linter gate to migration CI pipeline
QA starting full regression on tomorrow's demo build — 68 test cases, estimated 2.5 hours
ATL-704 full regression started — 68 test cases, ETA 10:30
test: full regression suite on demo build — 68 test cases covering all demo flows

Subject: PRD delivered — sprint planning confirmed | Body: All 6 features scoped, Feature 3 polling MVP, estimates included

DBA: user_sessions integrity confirmed — 14,200 rows correct, checksums match pre-corruption baseline
DBA: billing_records integrity confirmed — 8,847 rows correct, all billing data intact
DBA: feature_flags integrity confirmed — 412 rows restored to correct values, all feature states correct
NOVA-707 closed — all 3 tables integrity validated, zero data loss confirmed
CTO: taking read-only mode offline — full production restored, write queue draining
feat: disable read-only degraded mode — full read-write access restored to production
Production fully restored at 08:44 — 1,680 queued writes draining, drain rate 2,800 writes per minute
NOVA-701 closed — DB corruption resolved at 08:44, zero data loss, 44-minute recovery
Write queue drained — 1,680 writes processed in 36 seconds, all completed successfully
Subject: Nova maintenance complete | Body: System fully restored at 08:44, zero data loss, all services operational

Feature estimates continued: Feature 4 (3 days), Feature 5 (5 days), Feature 6 (2 days) — total 19 days, 3-person team

feat: scheduled DB integrity check — runs daily at 07:00, alerts on any checksum mismatch
NOVA-710 — automated daily integrity check scheduled, will prevent silent corruption in future
